headline: Business People: Best Buy CFO to depart amid top executive changes
summary: RETAIL Richfield-based electronics retailer Best Buy Co. announced that Matt Bilunas will step down as chief financial officer and depart the company at the end of July. The company is conducting an external search for a successor in conjunction with the appointment incoming CEO Jason Bonfig. Current CEO Corie Barry, who previously served as CFO, will provide financial oversight during the ...
